action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with iteration 0, 0.5h time budget, 30 iterations. Need to build a working DKT pipeline and validate it quickly. Analysis: Deep Knowledge Tracing (DKT) with LSTM is a strong, fast-to-train baseline for ASSISTments. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py; train for only 2 epochs to validate pipeline and measure iteration time, then submit eval immediately.
